report_name: Cherokee Federal Achieves CMMC Level 2 Certification, Preparing for Upcoming DoD Contract Requirements

identities.name: Cherokee Federal
identities.description: The federal contracting division of Cherokee Nation Businesses, which has achieved Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) Level 2 in preparation for upcoming Department of Defense (DoD) contract requirements.

identities.name: U.S. Department of Defense
identities.description: The U.S. government body mandating the CMMC program for contractors in the Defense Industrial Base (DIB) to protect Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI).

identities.name: Cherokee Nation Businesses
identities.description: The parent company of Cherokee Federal.

identities.name: Defense Industrial Base
identities.description: The ecosystem of over 300,000 companies that contract with the U.S. Department of Defense and are subject to CMMC requirements.

identities.name: National Institute of Standards and Technology
identities.description: The U.S. government agency that publishes NIST SP 800-171, which outlines the 110 security controls required for CMMC Level 2 certification.
